creator: will@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

I can no longer get the correct checksum by grabbing the distfile off 
the site and decrypting with no password. I am setting a one-month 
timeout period in which I will need a reply from you in order to keep 
this PR alive. Sorry for getting to this one so late.. it's pretty 
difficult to test a port when the distfile has such high restrictions. 
On that point, perhaps this should not have a port to begin with. The 
author's site states that the casual user should not touch this software. 
Therefore, it seems this program is not something that should be in 
the FreeBSD ports collection.
